name: Joe LaPorte Jr. Recreation Facility
description: Come play pickleball at Joe LaPorte Jr. Recreation Facility in Elizabethton, TN! There are 2 outdoor hard courts. The lines are permanent, but you'll need to bring your own net. The courts are free.

name: Roan Mountian
description: Roan Mountian is a place to play pickleball in Roan Mountain, TN. There are 2 outdoor asphalt courts. The lines are overlaid on a tennis court, so the net is a little taller than a normal pickleball net. The courts are free. The facility includes amenities like restrooms.

name: Sycamore Shoals State Historic Park
description: Sycamore Shoals State Historic Park is one of the most popular places to play pickleball in Elizabethton, TN. There are 6 outdoor hard courts. The lines are permanent, and portable nets are available. Players have access to lights. The courts are free.
